Resources | DWSIM
Resources
LEARNING RESOURCES
Spoken tutorials for DWSIM can be found
here
.
Spoken tutorials for Custom Modeling in DWISM using Python can be found
here
.
Spoken tutorials for Custom Modeling in DWISM using Scilab can be found
here
.
FORUMS
In case of any doubts in Spoken Tutorials, check the previous questions posted in the
Spoken Tutorial forum
before posting a new question.
If your query is already not existing among the previous questions, post your timed questions in
Spoken Tutorial forum
under the DWSIM category.
Please use the Spoken Tutorial Forum for questions on DWSIM Spoken Tutorial only.
In case of any technical queries in DWSIM, check the previous questions posted in the
FOSSEE
forum
before posting a new question.
If your query is already not existing among the previous questions, please feel free to post your questions in the
FOSSEE forum
under the DWSIM category.
Please use the FOSSEE Forum for technical or general queries on DWSIM.
JOURNAL PUBLICATIONS
Rahul Jain, Priyam Nayak, Rahul A. S, Pravin
Dalve
, Kannan M. Moudgalya, P. R. Naren, Daniel Wagner, and Peter Fritzson
"
Implementation of a Property Database and Thermodynamic Calculations in OpenModelica for Chemical Process Simulation.
"
Industrial & Engineering Chemistry Research
2019
58
(18), 7551-7560
(
DOI: 10.1021/acs.iecr.8b05147)
Priyam Nayak, Pravin
Dalve
, Rahul Anandi Sai, Rahul Jain, Kannan M. Moudgalya, P. R. Naren, Peter Fritzson, and Daniel Wagner "
Chemical Process Simulation Using OpenModelica
",
Industrial & Engineering Chemistry Research
2019
58
(26), 11164-11174
(DOI: 10.1021/acs.iecr.9b00104
)
